properties.name: Tactical Pattern #1546
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Parallels historical mercantile blockades. Focuses on choking narrow maritime supply routes and subsea data cables. Target vector identified as unhardened Deep Sea Polymetallic Nodes.

properties.name: Tactical Pattern #4163
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Reflects ancient infrastructure denial tactics, updated for the digital age to target power grids and satellite downlinks. Target vector identified as unhardened Subglacial Resource Deposit.

properties.name: Tactical Pattern #6842
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Identifies protracted, multi-domain attrition zones designed to drain adversary resources without triggering conventional red lines. Target vector identified as unhardened Equatorial Aerospace Corridor.

properties.name: Western Sahara — Global Phosphate Choke
properties.wounding_strategy: 70%+ of world phosphate reserves concentrated here. Proxy conflict or blockade triggers global fertilizer price collapse → famine and economic inflation in rival nations within one harvest cycle. Slow-burn demographic weapon requiring zero kinetic engagement.

properties.name: Atacama Lithium Triangle — Battery Supply Severance
properties.wounding_strategy: Fund eco-sabotage, labor union weaponization, or port terminal acquisition across Chile/Bolivia/Argentina lithium corridor. Starves West and Asia of EV transition and next-gen military battery materials. Zero geopolitical fallout — appears as domestic labor disputes.
properties.strategic_impact: SEVERE — global EV and defense tech supply chain

properties.name: French Guiana / Kourou — Equatorial Aerospace Denial
properties.wounding_strategy: Diplomatic and economic coercion of equatorial South American nations denies rivals optimal satellite launch trajectories (Earth rotation advantage). No military action needed — commercial licensing, economic dependence, and sovereignty pressure force access denial to SpaceX and defense contractors.
properties.strategic_impact: HIGH — orbital superiority and satellite constellation dominance

properties.name: SEA-ME-WE Mediterranean-Arabian Fiber Node — Digital Financial Paralysis
properties.wounding_strategy: Grey-zone disruption of SEA-ME-WE cable bundle in Mediterranean or Arabian Sea segment. 'Rogue' fishing trawler anchor drag severs the fiber. India UPI, digital sovereign currencies, and real-time cross-continental banking freeze for hours-to-days. Zero casualties, maximum economic paralysis.
properties.strategic_impact: CRITICAL — freezes international digital payments and stock markets

properties.name: DRC Cobalt Transport Corridors — Battery Raw Material Choke
properties.wounding_strategy: Targeted proxy destabilization of the narrow road and rail corridors out of DRC cobalt belt. Buying up specific port terminals (Beira, Dar es Salaam) where cobalt leaves Africa. Starves global battery manufacturing. Appears as civil unrest — no direct military attribution.
properties.strategic_impact: SEVERE — global EV battery and military electronics supply
